/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/artGallerySolver.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/artGallerySolver.dir/art-gallery-pg/artGallerySolver.C.o" "CMakeFiles/artGallerySolver.dir/art-gallery-pg/AuxGallery.C.o" -o artGallerySolver  -Wl,-rpath,/run/media/abd-faiyaz/Files/tozoni-2016-implementation/build: -lm libpolAlgorithms.so libAVPLightGrid.so libPreSolver.so libLagrangian.so libIGrid.so libPolygonWithHolesExt.so libPolygonExt.so /usr/lib64/libgmpxx.so /lib64/libmpfr.so /lib64/libgmp.so -lm -Wl,-rpath-link,/run/media/abd-faiyaz/Files/tozoni-2016-implementation/build
